resources.string: "To use this feature, please enable the 'Draw / Display over other apps' permission (also known as 'Apps that can appear on top') for Textra."

"It's considered by Android to be a special permission, so on most phones you access it from the gear or dot-dot-dot icon (top right) in Android Settings > Apps, and "not from the Textra permissions screen.
Your app icon has changed! So, you need to add it back to your home screen again.
To blocklist, long press in the chat list and select \"Blocklist\" from the menu.
When you blocklist a chat it is hidden from the chat list and only shown here, where you can view and unblock it. Messages you receive or send are still saved.
You can also do this in a specific chat.
A blocklisted chat is not shown in the chat list, and you are not notified when receiving messages.
Textra was just upgraded to version %1$s
"You can get help by going to Settings > Support. You can find answers there, or ask a human. Do you want me to take you there (type 'yes')?"
"Sorry, I'm just a simple bot! You can type '%1$s' to get a tip."
"Welcome to Textra. I'm a simple bot. You can send me anything you want, but I only understand some simple things. For example, you can type '%1$s' to get a tip."
Are you trying to tell me something?
"Thanks, I'll update my little black book"
"Tip: you can lock messages so you can't accidentally delete them. Lock messages by long pressing them and choosing '%1$s' in the dot-dot-dot menu."
Tip: on the right hand side of the screen there are hidden timestamps for each bubble. Drag a bubble to the left to see them. Try it now!
"Tip: tap on a bubble to get quick options. Try it now! Then tap '%1$s'."
Tip: in the chat list, drag left to reveal the call icon. Drag right for delete icon and message count.
Tip: tap the + icon, then long press the images icon to quickly select your most recent picture.
Tip: in the + panel, long press the camera icon to launch the full camera app.
Tip: tap the + icon to add things to a message. Try it now!
"I want to make a 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' request."

When you visit this website, we collect personal information such as IP addresses, cookie identifiers and other pseudonymous identifiers. This information may be used to personalize content based on your interests, run and optimize advertising campaigns tailored to you, measure the performance of ads and content, and derive insights about the audiences who engage with ads and content. This information may also be disclosed by us to third parties on the IAB’s List of Downstream Participants that may further disclose it to other third parties."
"
Using personal information as described above is an integral part of how we operate our website, make revenue to support our staff, and generate relevant content for our audience. You can learn more about our data collection and use practices in our Privacy Policy."
"
If you wish to opt out of the disclosure of your personal information to third parties by us, please use the below opt out and confirm your selection. Please note that after your opt out request is processed, you may continue seeing interest-based ads based on personal Information utilized by us or personal information disclosed to third parties prior to your opt out. You may separately opt out of the further disclosure of your personal information by third parties on the IAB’s List of Downstream Participants.
I want to request that you ‘Do Not Sell My Personal Information’

"We and our partners store and/or access information on a device, such as cookies and process personal data, such as unique identifiers and standard information sent by a device for personalised ads and content, ad and content measurement, and audience insights, as well as to develop and improve products, with your permission we and out partners may use precise geolocation data and identification through device scanning. You may click to consent to out and out partners' processing as described above.
Alternatively you may access more detailed information and change your preferences before consenting or to refuse consenting. Please note that some processing of your personal data may not require your consent, but you have a right yo object to such processing. Your preferences will apply to a group of websites."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Video messages may contain a harmful exploit that can leave your phone vulnerable to attacks. Would you like to continue?

Some carriers split long messages into multiple SMS parts. These parts are often received out of order and that can cause confusion. Convert to MMS to avoid this issue (additional carrier costs may apply).
Your ad-free period is over. Most users continue for free with ads.
Your ad-free period is over. Most %1$s owners continue for free with ads.
Blocklisted. See Settings > Blocklisted to un-blocklist or un-blocklist here.
Pinned to top of chat list.
Blocklisted. See Settings > Blocklisted to un-blocklist
To delete locked messages, unlock them first.
Textra is working to optimize your messages and make it super fast

"Textra SMS is a seriously beautiful, feature rich SMS and MMS replacement app. I really like it, check it out @ %1$s.
Also check-out this amazing independent review @ %2$s"
Clear the notification and call the contact.
Clear the notification and delete the last message received.
Reply inline in the Android Heads-up (less features than Quick Reply).
Clear the notification and mark the message as read.
Clear the notification and mark the message as not yet read.
Cookies, device identifiers, or other information can be stored or accessed on yout device for the purposes presented to you
"Vendors can: * Store and access information on the device such as cookies and device identifiers presented to a user."
Store and/or access information on a device
"To schedule messages, please enable the 'Alarms & Reminders' permission for Textra."
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
A clipboard manager app has caused a crash. Please uninstall it, reboot, and try again.
Something went wrong saving to the Gallery.
"Can't save this kind of file to the Gallery."
Something went wrong accessing the content. Please try again.

Please also note that this website/app uses 1 or more Google services and may gather and store information including but not limited to your visit or usage behaviour. You may click to grant or deny consent to Google and its third-party tags to use your data for below specified purposes in below Google consent section.
Failed to connect to Giphy, please check your internet connection
Including media files such as photos and videos may not work because the email may become too large.
Textra will need some permissions to work properly.
For Textra to function it needs to be the default SMS app on your phone.
Still optimizing these messages. They will soon appear here…
Textra is working to optimize your messages and make it super fast
There was an error writing to the SD card
To add to calendar, you need to install a suitable app
To add a contact, you need to install a suitable app
To call a contact, you need to install a suitable app
To import a calendar event, you need to install a suitable app
To import a VCard, you need to install a suitable app
To send an email, you need to install an email app
To send a message, you need to install a suitable app
To show or edit a contact, you need to install a suitable app
To view on a map, you need to install a suitable app
To view this, you need to install a suitable app
Please make sure the SD card is mounted, and try again
This chat has content you want to keep. You can type something to remember below, or better yet, share content from other apps and keep it in this chat.
You can set legitimate interest preferences for the partners these partners we work with below. You can object to a specific partner by switching off individual toggles below.
Manage how your personal data is processed
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
You have selected more than the maximum of %1$d chats. Please select less chats.
Tapping and holding a bubble also enters multi-select mode!
Failed to send an audio attachment.
Failed to send a calendar event.
Set this to temporarily de-activate WiFi when sending or receiving an MMS. This makes MMS work with T-Mobile, Xfinity and some AT&T users.
Textra automatically compresses pictures and videos to fit within this limit, so your carrier will accept them.
Note: choose a smaller value if your carrier is failing your messages (too large).
This media is too large for your mobile carrier
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Starred contacts appear here, so they are only a single tap away. You can star contacts in your contacts app.
Pinned contacts appear here, so they are only a single tap away.
"Contacts you've recently texted appear here, most recent at the top, so they are only a single tap away."

"After 1 November 2018, Google only allows app updates that use white notification icons, not colored ones. That means your colored notification icons will not work anymore %1$s
However, we came up with an alternative you may like: notification shapes. To set notification shapes, go to Settings > Customize Notifications > Notification Icon.
Enjoy!"
Note: to go to the Android notification settings, select only a single chat.

"Android doesn't provide heads-up notifications when your phone is locked. However, Textra does! The Textra heads-up notification will slide down from the top of the lock screen and provide a larger and more visible notification. Tap to reply without unlocking. Swipe up to leave till later."
Heads-up notifications typically slide down from the top of the screen and provide a larger and more visible notification. Tap to reply. Swipe up to leave till later.
"Don't auto close after send, so you can continue to chat (to close, swipe Quick Reply to the right)"
Automatically close Quick Reply popup after sending
Mark message(s) as read when clearing the notification
Textra notifies the Pebble watch directly for an improved notification experience. To avoid duplicate notifications, please disable notifications to Textra from the Pebble app.
Tap + button to make your own custom pattern.
A temporary problem with your carrier prevents Textra from retrieving an MMS sent to you. Please tap to retry.
Your carrier has a temporary MMS problem
Failed to send MMS: %1$s: No MMS connection
Failed to send MMS: %1$s: No MMS connection
Consent to the use of this technology and the processing of your personal data for the purposes below. You can change your mind at any time.
Manage consent preference for our partners

You can set consent preferences for individual third-party partners we work with below. Expand each company list item to see what purposes they use data for to help make your choices. In some cases, companies may use your data without asking for your consent, based on their legitimate interests. You can click on their privacy policy links for more information and to object to such processing.
"· Select basic ads · Create a personalised ads profile · Select personalised ads · Measure ad performance · Apply market research to generate audience insights · Develop and improve products"
"· Ensure security, prevent fraud, and debug · Technically deliver ads or content"
Get thousands of beautiful Twitter style emojis to share with your friends!
Get thousands of fun Android Blob emojis to share with your friends!
Get thousands of fun iOS emojis to share with your friends!
Get thousands of fun JoyPixel emojis to share with your friends!
Tap to compose a new message
Blocklisted. See Textra > Settings > Blocklisted to un-blocklist
Long press a search result to get more options, like delete, lock & unlock, and more.
Error during send. Please try again.
If upgrading to pro is not for you, we still appreciate your support! Just select an ad position that suits you best.
Select an ad position that suits you best.
Note: Textra will be restarted when you change the icon color.
Automatically blocklist chats from email contacts that are not in your address book.
Let Textra choose theme colors for your contacts.
Show unread message count on Textra icon.
Show delivery status: Sent or Delivered.
Show delivery status: Sent or Delivered.

"As soon as you've reproduced the problem.
Please note: the debug log may contain privacy related information, such as phone numbers, contact names and text messages."
Long press on emoji to change skin tone. Long press here to set your default skin tone.
Could not install emojis after downloading. The system error is: %1$s
Check this if asked by Textra support (Textra will run a tiny bit slower).
Textra is written in English, and is translated by volunteers. If you want to help improve the translation, or add another translation, please email us!
"Tip: customize more than one chat at once by long pressing in the chat list and choosing '%1$s' from the dot-dot-dot menu."
Tap here to make me vibrate!
Choose what to do about ads.
To mark all as read, Textra needs to be the default app.
Keep all text and %2$s media messages for this chat and periodically delete the oldest ones.
Keep all text and %2$s media messages per chat and periodically delete the oldest ones.
Keep %1$s text and all media messages for this chat and periodically delete the oldest ones.
Keep %1$s text and all media messages per chat and periodically delete the oldest ones.
Keep %1$s text and %2$s media messages for this chat and periodically delete the oldest ones.
Keep %1$s text and %2$s media messages per chat and periodically delete the oldest ones.
When composing a new message, only show mobile contacts.
Send messages from pull-down Notification Drawer.
Remove accents and diacritics before sending. Never, Always or only if results in sending fewer SMS messages (cost less).
Resyncs Textra with a fresh copy of the stock database. Textra can get out of sync if, for example, you have used other SMS apps. All settings stay the same.
"Textra is busy syncing right now. Please wait until it's finished."
Automatically save pictures to the gallery.
Save space when sending by storing the compressed version of media, instead of the original size.
Sends a single MMS message addressed to all recipients. Replies go to everyone.
Sends a single MMS message addressed to all recipients. Replies go to everyone (make sure Your Mobile Number is set below).
Sends a message to each recipient one by one. Replies go only to you.
Show counter (once message is 2 lines or more).
Show smart (contextual) suggestions to make it quicker for you to reply. On-device only, no data ever leaves your phone.
If your carrier (or custom ROM) fails to send long messages, try splitting them.
Video messages can contain an exploit called Stagefright that will harm your phone. If set, protects by ensuring new video messages cannot automatically run the exploit.
Failed to contact support. Check your internet connection and try again.
If your idea is listed below, then vote on it now!
Your idea has been sent to the Textra development team for consideration.
Your idea is new or different?
No matching ideas. Please double check your idea, and then proceed.
Please enter your email address and name
Failed to login to UserVoice, please try again
Replace this text with your name, see the context for details.
What to do with notifications for contacts that are not in your address book.
When a message contains a web link, show a snippet of the web page it points to.
Initially changes the send icon to %1$s to quickly dictate a voice memo.
Used to identify you in MMS group messaging.
You just received a group MMS, and it seems your mobile number is not set up. To avoid sending replies to yourself, please set Textra Settings > Your Mobile Number.
To turn on signatures, tap the + button to create one
The newest reaction is at the top.
Tap undo within 20 seconds to undo the delete
